problems.diagnostic: named thing must be an expression with a type
problems.cause: AGREE guarantee statements reference port names that are not valid expressions in the component type scope
problems.minimal_edit: Move the AGREE annex block from component type GYRO to component implementation GYRO.IMPL

executor_steps: Remove the annex agree block from the GYRO component type
Add a new annex agree block to the GYRO.IMPL component implementation
In the new annex agree block, replace the guarantee statements with equivalent assign statements that reference the connection parameters
Ensure the assign statements properly bind the subcomponent outputs to the implementation outputs
